节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Obtains a global shared system ResourceManager object that provides access to only system resource, in which the resConfig is current system resConfig(contains resLocale, screenDensityDpi, direction, etc). which is not mapped to application sandbox, This error code will be thrown.
注释信息: @returns { ResourceManager } The System ResourceManager object is returned.
@throws { BusinessError } 9001009 - Failed to access the system resource.
节点.return_description: The System ResourceManager object is returned.

error_codes.description: Failed to access the system resource.
